expectations.text: Builds a hierarchical/multilevel model with school-level and student-level parameters
expectations.evidence: Two-level hierarchical model with mu_global, mu_school (dims='school'), sigma_school, sigma_student, and Normal likelihood.

expectations.text: Uses non-centered parameterization (mu_offset * sigma pattern or equivalent)
expectations.evidence: mu_raw = pm.Normal('mu_raw', mu=0, sigma=1, dims='school') followed by mu_school = pm.Deterministic('mu_school', mu_global + mu_raw * sigma_school, dims='school').

expectations.text: Uses az.summary() or az.plot_trace() for convergence diagnostics
expectations.evidence: az.summary(idata, round_to=3) and az.plot_trace(idata, kind='rank_vlines') both used.

expectations.text: Includes shrinkage analysis showing small schools pulled toward grand mean
expectations.evidence: Full shrinkage plot with arrows from observed to posterior means, scatter points sized by sample size, global mean reference line.

expectations.text: Computes ICC (intraclass correlation) or variance partition coefficient
expectations.evidence: ICC computed as sigma_school^2 / (sigma_school^2 + sigma_student^2) with mean, 94% HDI, and interpretation.

expectations.text: Uses coords and dims in the PyMC model definition
expectations.evidence: coords = {'school': school_names, 'obs': ...}, pm.Model(coords=coords), dims used throughout.

expectations.text: Reports credible intervals (94% HDI preferred) for school-level estimates
expectations.evidence: az.summary with hdi_prob=0.94 and az.plot_forest with hdi_prob=0.94 for school-level estimates.

expectations.text: Runs calibration checks using ArviZ (plot_ppc_pit or similar)
expectations.evidence: azp.plot_ppc_pit(idata) for PPC-PIT and azp.plot_ppc_pit(idata, loo_pit=True) for LOO-PIT.
